title: MASUKU
description:
An abstract strategy game of clever placement and calculated risk. Place and rotate cards to reveal colours and symbols that match ever-changing scoring goals. 
Featuring a sleek minimal art style. 

Players placed hurdles with holes in them over a grid to score points. The color and shape in each grid space will determine the score based on the current active rule cards. 

Multiple game modes to explore 

Game modes:
Daily challenge (a deterministic challenge that refreshes every day with leaderboards to compete with your friends)
Solo mode: randomly generated challenge mode to practice ur skills

2-4 player VS: Play a 2-4 player game in local head to head. take turns to place cards. Fist to 50 wins 
VS CPU : play a 2 player game against the CPU
White out: place cards to remove all but 1 square from the board.
description_short: An abstract strategy game for 1–4 players. Place, rotate, and flip cards to reveal colours and symbols that match shifting scoring goals. Smart positioning and a bit of luck decide who reaches 50 points first
